MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena, is present. Represented by Mitchell Brown
Attorney, S. Clinton Woods, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ronnie King, is present.
Attorney, Paul Behrend , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
